name: parallax
title: Parallax
description: A scroll-linked parallax layer for marketing sections: the inner layer drifts as the section passes through the viewport, driven entirely by CSS scroll-driven animations (animation-timeline: view()). Zero JS on the scroll path, zero runtime deps, and guarded by @supports so unsupported browsers render it static. Give the container a height and put an oversized object-cover image or gradient inside.
